    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    FileManager.loadArtists(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
    Loads artists from a text file.
    static void
    FileManager.loadContents(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
    Loads media content,linking artists and generating genres.
    static void
    FileManager.loadGenres(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
    Loads genre definitions into the system.
    static void
    FileManager.loadSystem(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)
    Restores application states from a binary file, resolving and re-linking object reference paths to secure data topology across internal collections.
    static void
    FileManager.loadUsers(String filepath, StreamingDatabase db)
    Loads users from into the database.
    static void
    FileManager.saveArtists(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)
     
    static void
    FileManager.saveContents(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)
     
    static void
    FileManager.saveGenres(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)
     
    static void
    FileManager.saveSystem(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)
    Captures a runtime state snapshot by compiling entity collections and writing them into a single serialized binary object stream.
    static void
    FileManager.saveUsers(StreamingDatabase db, String filepath)
